docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $105.00) SERVED JAN-31-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, RICHARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVA, RICHARD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,705.00, FOR TOWING AND STORAGE EXPENSES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
